summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Bond Trading System V3 features including Paper Trading and Strategy Marketplace. Backend APIs are fully functional (10/10 tests passed), but frontend authentication integration has critical issues preventing proper user session management.

ui_bugs.issue: User authentication succeeds but frontend session is not properly maintained, causing redirects back to login page
V3 navigation links (Paper Trading, Strategy Marketplace) are present in user dropdown menu but not accessible due to auth issues

integration_issues.issue: Login API call succeeds (200 status) but frontend AuthContext doesn't maintain user state properly
Paper Trading and Strategy Marketplace pages redirect to login despite successful authentication

passed_tests: Asset Prices API - returns live market data
Paper Trading API - portfolio, trade execution, history
Strategy Marketplace API - browse, publish, subscribe
V3 navigation links exist in user menu
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication integration: The backend login API works correctly and returns proper user data, but the frontend AuthContext is not maintaining the user session properly. This causes users to be redirected back to login page even after successful authentication. The issue appears to be in the cookie handling or session persistence in the React app. V3 features (Paper Trading, Strategy Marketplace) are implemented and accessible via user dropdown menu but cannot be tested due to auth issues.
